description_long: This rustic cabin features a steeply pitched, yellow thatched gable roof supported by dark wooden beams, giving it a weathered, hand-built appearance. The structure sits on a sandy, uneven base with rocks and sparse vegetation, suggesting a rural or edge-of-town setting. The front facade is adorned with a small wooden ladder, a log pile, and a simple door, while the side displays a hanging scale and a single, small window with a grid pattern. Two prominent chimneys rise from the roof, adding to the lived-in feel. The rear of the cabin is mostly roof, with minimal openings and a few structural supports visible. The overall design is asymmetrical, with various utilitarian objects and architectural details scattered around the exterior.
description: A rustic, thatched-roof cabin with wooden beams, a small window, two chimneys, and scattered outdoor objects on a sandy base. The structure has a weathered, hand-built look and asymmetrical features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, a wooden ladder, log pile, and the prominent yellow thatched roof with two chimneys.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a single small window, a hanging scale, and the sloped roof extending nearly to the ground.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the expanse of the thatched roof, minimal openings, and structural supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays a small covered entry, a jug, and more logs, with the hanging scale and rock visible.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable thatched roof with overhangs and two chimneys
attribute_window_arrangement: one small, rectangular window with a grid pattern on the left side; asymmetrical and isolated
attribute_door_placement: single door centered on the front facade, beneath the main roof overhang
